extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked with 2.5km remaining on Col de Turini, dropped VINGEGAARD and GULDAU before all regrouped, won from small group sprint after looking around.
tactical_patterns: FOSS isolated UAE by pacing alone for VISMA until 6km, exposing POGAČAR had no teammates left earlier than expected.
POGAČAR attacked at 2.5km but group hesitation in final 500m allowed VINGEGAARD/GULDAU back, wasting the gap gained.
MARTINEZ and SIVAKOV dropped early when FOSS paced, suggesting UAE's climbing depth weaker than VISMA/INEOS on sustained efforts.

rider_signals.FOSS Tobias: positive: solo-paced for VISMA from 15km to 6km, controlling entire finale and isolating rivals without teammates.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: recovered from POGAČAR's 2.5km attack better than Stage 4, limiting losses to regain contact before finish.
rider_signals.GULDAU Clément: positive: only 12 seconds behind POGAČAR after sustained climb, suggesting GC threat still viable despite UAE dominance.
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel: negative: dropped early when FOSS accelerated at 9km, losing GC position despite being UAE protected rider.
rider_signals.JORGENSON Mattias: negative: lost contact before 4km remaining despite VISMA support, exposing limitations on longest climbs of week.
rider_signals.SCANMOREZA Matteo: negative: crashed and abandoned on approach to final climb, removing INEOS GC option.
